holdings.infoBox: QABA is an equity ETF with a total of 148 individual holdings. The top holdings are Wintrust Financial stock at 4.56%, Commerce Bancshares at 3.52%, United Bankshares at 2.73%, Hancock Whitney at 2.54%, and Bank OZK at 2.51%.

overview.description: The First Trust NASDAQ ABA Community Bank Index Fund (QABA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ OMX ABA Community Bank index. The fund tracks an index of NASDAQ-listed banks and thrifts, excluding the 50 largest. QABA was launched on Jun 29, 2009 and is issued by First Trust.
